components.name: EditFileTool
components.description: The primary code insertion mechanism. Replaces an exact text string in a file with new content. The `old_string` serves as both the position anchor and the correctness anchor.

components.name: EditFileInput
components.description: The structured input the LLM provides to target an edit

components.name: EditFileResult
components.description: Structured feedback returned to the LLM after every edit — enables self-verification

components.name: StructuredPatchHunk
components.description: Individual diff hunk for structured diff output

components.name: ReadFileTool
components.description: Read files with offset/limit paging and binary detection

components.name: SyntaxGate
components.description: Post-edit tree-sitter syntax verification — uses Rigorix's existing `code_graph` module
